bird.name: White-browed antpitta
bird.summary: The white-browed antpitta (Hylopezus ochroleucus) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

locations.name: Caatinga
locations.summary: Caatinga (; [kaaˈt͡ʃĩɡɐ]) is a type of semi-arid tropical vegetation, and an ecoregion characterized by this vegetation…

locations.name: 塞阿拉州
locations.summary: 塞阿拉州（葡萄牙語：Ceará，[seaˈɾa] ）是巴西26个联邦州之一，位于东北地区北部，东邻北里奥格兰德州和帕拉伊巴州，南邻伯南布哥州，西邻皮奥伊州，北和东北方向濒临大西洋。塞阿拉州面积为148,894.442平方千米，占东北地区面…

locations.name: 马托格罗索州
locations.summary: 马托格罗索州（葡萄牙語：Mato Grosso）是巴西西部的一个州，首府库亚巴。面积为903,357平方公里。人口2,856,999人。为巴西第三大州。为世界上仅存的大片未开发地区之一。自西北方向起顺时针分别与朗多尼亚州、亚马孙州、帕拉州…

relations.subject: White-browed antpitta
relations.evidence: The white-browed antpitta is found in the caatinga region of eastern Brazil from western Ceará south into northern Mato Grosso
